pages.text: The $(item)Large Dungeon Skyseed$() — not a single spawner cube but a whole $(item)sprawling dungeon$(): cobblestone rooms and corridors, mob spawners, prison cells, a flooded vault and a lava pit, all sunk into the island with one stepped stair down.$(br2)$(bold)The cost$()$(br)End-game, like the huge seeds: a $(item)Dungeon Skyseed$() ringed between an $(item)Ender Pearl$() and $(item)Blaze Powder$(), packed in cobblestone.
The dungeon seed between an ender pearl and blaze powder.
$(bold)What you get$()$(br)A maze of spawner rooms (zombie, skeleton, spider), cells, and a $(item)treasure vault$() — loot and a renewable mob-farm core, with the surface stair the only tell.
